_comment: Canonical FluidX3D runtime config. Edit via dashboard or directly. fx3d_run.py copies into iter_dir/case.txt every run (no rebuild needed). Keys with `_` prefix are stripped before runtime.

_doc.dt_out_s: s | PNG/VTK output interval (also = refill loop interval) | 0.05~0.5 | 0.1
_doc.lbm_u_ref: lattice (dimensionless) | velocity scale -> sets relaxation tau. <=0.1 stable | 0.01~0.1 | 0.05
_doc.side_walls: E|S | E=equilibrium (absorb), S=solid (reflect). E gives transparent rendering | E or S | E
_doc.floor_type: S|E | S=solid floor (pond reflects), E=absorb | S or E | S
_doc.nozzle_LPM: L/min | volumetric flow per nozzle. v=Q/A then floor 1.0 m/s for stability (fx3d_run.py:84) | 30~300 | 60
_doc.nozzle_area_cells: int | nozzle footprint = (2r+1)^2 where r = val/2. val=2 -> 3x3 cells | 1~5 | 2
_doc.seed_col_h: cells | warmup column depth below nozzle (init only, refill maintains). col_h * dp = visible nozzle bar length | 5~30 | 12
_doc.pond_prefill_z_m: m | t=0 pre-fill upper z bound (z<=this filled with TYPE_F). 0=off | 0~5 | 0
_doc.pond_prefill_z_bot_m: m | t=0 pre-fill lower z bound (band-style). 0=half-open | 0~30 | 0
_doc.pond_prefill_xy_bbox_m: [x_lo,y_lo,x_hi,y_hi] m | xy constraint for prefill. [0,0,0,0]=off | bbox | [0,0,0,0]
_doc.viscosity_m2ps: m^2/s | kinematic viscosity. water=1e-6. >=1e-5 = stabilizing hack | 1e-7~1e-4 | 1e-6
_doc.camera: [rx,ry,fov,zoom] | rotation deg + FOV deg + zoom factor | - | [200,15,60,1]
_doc.push_to_rhino: bool | post-sim, push sculpture STL to Rhino via MCP | true/false | true
_doc.thicken_thickness_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | thicken_collider.py thickness for open mesh closing
_doc.score_slab_thickness_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | fx3d_postprocess.py positive/negative slab inflation
_doc.fluid_threshold: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | phi cutoff for retention counts in postprocess
_doc.domain_pad_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | fx3d_run.py computes domain_bbox_m with this padding around sculpture bbox
